httpCodes.title: Ma trang thai HTTP
httpCodes.description: Tai lieu tham khao cho ma trang thai va phan hoi HTTP
httpCodes.searchPlaceholder: Tim ma trang thai hoac mo ta...
httpCodes.noMatch: Khong tim thay ma trang thai phu hop
httpCodes.infoTitle: Kien thuc co ban ve ma trang thai HTTP
infoItems: 1xx - Phan hoi thong tin cho biet yeu cau da duoc nhan va dang duoc xu ly
2xx - Phan hoi thanh cong cho biet yeu cau da duoc nhan, hieu va chap nhan
3xx - Phan hoi Redirect yeu cau hanh dong bo sung de hoan tat yeu cau
4xx - Phan hoi loi phia client cho biet yeu cau khong hop le hoac khong the thuc hien
5xx - Phan hoi loi phia server cho biet may chu khong the xu ly yeu cau hop le

codes.name: Continue
codes.desc: The initial part of the request has been received and the client should continue sending the rest.

codes.name: Switching Protocols
codes.desc: The server agrees to switch protocols according to the client's request.

codes.name: Processing
codes.desc: The server has received and is processing the request, but no response is available yet.

codes.name: OK
codes.desc: The request succeeded, typically for GET or POST requests.

codes.name: Created
codes.desc: The request succeeded and created a new resource.

codes.name: Accepted
codes.desc: The request was accepted for processing, but it has not been completed yet.

codes.name: Non-Authoritative Information
codes.desc: The response metadata comes from a local or third-party copy instead of the origin server.

codes.name: No Content
codes.desc: The request succeeded, but the response contains no body.

codes.name: Reset Content
codes.desc: The request succeeded and the client should reset the current document view.

codes.name: Partial Content
codes.desc: The server is returning only part of the resource because of a range request.

codes.name: Multiple Choices
codes.desc: The requested resource has multiple possible representations for the client to choose from.

codes.name: Moved Permanently
codes.desc: The requested resource has been permanently moved to a new URI.

codes.name: Found
codes.desc: The requested resource is temporarily located at a different URI.

codes.name: See Other
codes.desc: The response to the request can be found under another URI using GET.

codes.name: Not Modified
codes.desc: The cached resource has not changed, so the client can use its local copy.

codes.name: Temporary Redirect
codes.desc: The resource is temporarily redirected and the original request method must be preserved.

codes.name: Permanent Redirect
codes.desc: The resource has moved permanently and the original request method must be preserved.

codes.name: Bad Request
codes.desc: The server cannot process the request because of invalid syntax.

codes.name: Unauthorized
codes.desc: Authentication is required before the request can be completed.

codes.name: Payment Required
codes.desc: Reserved for future use, often associated with digital payment systems.

codes.name: Forbidden
codes.desc: The server understood the request but refuses to authorize it.

codes.name: Not Found
codes.desc: The server cannot find the requested resource.

codes.name: Method Not Allowed
codes.desc: The request method is not allowed for the target resource.

codes.name: Not Acceptable
codes.desc: The server cannot provide a response matching the client's acceptable formats.

codes.name: Proxy Authentication Required
codes.desc: The client must authenticate itself with the proxy before continuing.

codes.name: Request Timeout
codes.desc: The server timed out waiting for the request.

codes.name: Conflict
codes.desc: The request conflicts with the current state of the target resource.

codes.name: Gone
codes.desc: The resource is no longer available and no forwarding address is known.

codes.name: Length Required
codes.desc: The server requires a valid Content-Length header.

codes.name: Precondition Failed
codes.desc: One or more conditions in the request headers evaluated to false.

codes.name: Payload Too Large
codes.desc: The request body is larger than the server is willing or able to process.

codes.name: URI Too Long
codes.desc: The requested URI is longer than the server can process.

codes.name: Unsupported Media Type
codes.desc: The server does not support the media type used in the request.

codes.name: I'm a teapot
codes.desc: A humorous status code indicating the server refuses to brew coffee because it is a teapot.

codes.name: Unprocessable Entity
codes.desc: The server understands the request format but cannot process the contained instructions.

codes.name: Too Many Requests
codes.desc: The client has sent too many requests in a given time period.

codes.name: Unavailable For Legal Reasons
codes.desc: The resource is unavailable because of legal restrictions.

codes.name: Internal Server Error
codes.desc: The server encountered an unexpected error while processing the request.

codes.name: Not Implemented
codes.desc: The server does not support the functionality required to fulfill the request.

codes.name: Bad Gateway
codes.desc: A gateway or proxy server received an invalid response from the upstream server.

codes.name: Service Unavailable
codes.desc: The server is temporarily unable to handle the request, usually due to overload or maintenance.

codes.name: Gateway Timeout
codes.desc: A gateway or proxy server did not receive a timely response from the upstream server.

codes.name: HTTP Version Not Supported
codes.desc: The server does not support the HTTP protocol version used in the request.

phpReference.title: Tai lieu tham khao ham PHP
phpReference.description: Tai lieu tham khao truc tuyen cho cac ham PHP pho bien
phpReference.infoDescription: This page lists commonly used PHP functions by category for quick lookup. It is intended as a handy overview for developers and does not replace the official PHP documentation.

functions.name: strlen
functions.desc: Get the length of a string

functions.name: substr
functions.desc: Return part of a string

functions.name: strpos
functions.desc: Find the position of the first occurrence of a substring

functions.name: str_replace
functions.desc: Replace all occurrences of the search string

functions.name: explode
functions.desc: Split a string into an array using a separator

functions.name: implode
functions.desc: Join array elements into a string

functions.name: trim
functions.desc: Strip whitespace or other characters from both ends of a string

functions.name: strtolower
functions.desc: Convert a string to lowercase

functions.name: strtoupper
functions.desc: Convert a string to uppercase

functions.name: sprintf
functions.desc: Return a formatted string

functions.name: preg_match
functions.desc: Perform a regular expression match

functions.name: preg_replace
functions.desc: Perform a regular expression search and replace

functions.name: count
functions.desc: Count elements in an array or Countable object

functions.name: array_push
functions.desc: Push one or more elements onto the end of an array

functions.name: array_pop
functions.desc: Pop the last element off an array

functions.name: array_merge
functions.desc: Merge one or more arrays

functions.name: array_keys
functions.desc: Return all the keys of an array

functions.name: array_values
functions.desc: Return all the values of an array

functions.name: in_array
functions.desc: Check if a value exists in an array

functions.name: array_search
functions.desc: Search an array for a value and return its key

functions.name: array_map
functions.desc: Apply a callback to the elements of an array

functions.name: array_filter
functions.desc: Filter elements of an array using a callback

functions.name: sort
functions.desc: Sort an array in ascending order

functions.name: usort
functions.desc: Sort an array with a user-defined comparison function

functions.name: file_get_contents
functions.desc: Read an entire file into a string

functions.name: file_put_contents
functions.desc: Write data to a file

functions.name: fopen
functions.desc: Open a file or URL

functions.name: fclose
functions.desc: Close an open file pointer

functions.name: fread
functions.desc: Read from a file pointer

functions.name: fwrite
functions.desc: Write to a file pointer

functions.name: file_exists
functions.desc: Check whether a file or directory exists

functions.name: is_file
functions.desc: Check whether the path is a regular file

functions.name: unlink
functions.desc: Delete a file

functions.name: mkdir
functions.desc: Create a directory

functions.name: date
functions.desc: Format a local date and time

functions.name: time
functions.desc: Get the current Unix timestamp

functions.name: strtotime
functions.desc: Parse a textual datetime into a Unix timestamp

functions.name: mktime
functions.desc: Get a Unix timestamp for a date

functions.name: date_create
functions.desc: Create a DateTime object

functions.name: json_encode
functions.desc: Convert a value to a JSON string

functions.name: json_decode
functions.desc: Decode a JSON string into a PHP value

functions.name: abs
functions.desc: Get the absolute value

functions.name: ceil
functions.desc: Round fractions up

functions.name: floor
functions.desc: Round fractions down

functions.name: round
functions.desc: Round a number

functions.name: max
functions.desc: Find the largest value

functions.name: min
functions.desc: Find the smallest value

functions.name: rand
functions.desc: Generate a random integer

functions.name: isset
functions.desc: Check whether a variable is set and not null

functions.name: empty
functions.desc: Check whether a variable is empty

functions.name: var_dump
functions.desc: Dump information about a variable

functions.name: print_r
functions.desc: Print human-readable information about a variable

functions.name: gettype
functions.desc: Get the type of a variable

functions.name: is_array
functions.desc: Check whether a variable is an array

functions.name: is_string
functions.desc: Check whether a variable is a string

functions.name: is_numeric
functions.desc: Check whether a variable is a number or numeric string

csrGenerator.title: Trinh tao CSR
csrGenerator.description: Tao Certificate Signing Request (CSR) truc tuyen
csrGenerator.serverConnectionFailed: Failed to connect to the server, please try again later

placeholders.csr: Paste the CSR content here, starting with -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE REQUEST-----

csrGenerator.privateKeyWarning: The private key is highly sensitive. Keep it safe and never share it publicly. If it is leaked, your certificate security may be compromised.
csrGenerator.aboutDescription: A CSR (Certificate Signing Request) is an encoded file sent to a certificate authority (CA) when applying for an SSL/TLS certificate. It contains information about your domain and organization, as well as the public key that matches your private key. After verification, the CA uses the CSR to issue the SSL certificate.

Ho tro thao tac bat dong bo nhu setTimeout va Promise

formValidationDemo.title: Demo xac thuc bieu mau

validation.username: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores, and must be 3-20 characters long

validation.idCard: Please enter a valid ID card number
validation.address: Address must be no longer than 200 characters
validation.bio: Bio must be no longer than 500 characters

formValidationDemo.infoTitle: Tinh nang xac thuc bieu mau

infoItems.title: Live validation
infoItems.description: Checks format while typing and validates again on blur

infoItems.title: Multiple rule types
infoItems.description: Supports required fields, length checks, regular expressions, and custom validation

infoItems.title: Visual feedback
infoItems.description: Shows validation status clearly with colors, icons, and messages

infoItems.title: Data cleanup
infoItems.description: Automatically trims and normalizes submitted data

infoItems.title: Helpful error prompts
infoItems.description: Provides user-friendly guidance for correcting input

infoItems.title: Accessibility support
infoItems.description: Helps keep forms usable for all users

keyboardShortcutsHelp.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keyboardShortcutsHelp.toggleDescription: Show or hide keyboard shortcut help
keyboardShortcutsHelp.helpTextAfter: to show or hide this help
tipItems: Shortcut labels may look slightly different across operating systems
Some shortcuts may conflict with browser shortcuts
Use the Tab key to move between focusable elements
Press Enter to activate buttons and links

performanceDashboard.title: Performance Dashboard
tips: Use the app normally while monitoring; data will update in real time
FCP < 1.8s, LCP < 2.5s, FID < 100ms, and CLS < 0.1 are considered excellent
If memory usage exceeds 80%, consider optimizing the code
You can export a detailed report for deeper analysis
performanceDashboard.emptyState: Click ?Start monitoring? to begin performance analysis
